name: Fudge Souffle'
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk the cocoa powder, confectioners' sugar, and milk in the top of a double boiler over boiling water until smooth.
2. Add the chocolate chips and stir until melted.
3. In a large bowl, beat the egg whites until soft peaks form.
4. Gradually add sugar and beat until stiff peaks form.
5. Fold vanilla extract and half cup (1/2) of the chocolate mixture into the egg white mixture.
6. Bring water in the bottom of the double boiler back to a boil.
7. Stir the chocolate-egg white mixture into the chocolate mixture in the top of the double-boiler.
8. Using an electric beater or whisk, beat this mixture for one minute until well combined.
9. Cover the double boiler and continue cooking over boiling water for 25-30 minutes until the souffle is puffed and set.
10. Serve with lowfat whipped topping if desired.
